creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

I got into contact with the company and they confirmed that they still
support FreeBSD:

"... BRU fully supports versions 4.2 through 8.1 both as a standalone
backup tool and as a client to the enterprise-level BRU Server product.
 We offer both 32bit and 64bit Intel builds and can offer PPC, Alpha,
Itanium 2, and SPARC versions if customers require.  ..."

I will update the entry in the "Commercial support section" of our
website accordingly.


- -- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
